---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new agent, skill, workflow, rule, or convention for the harness
title: "[feature] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
---

## What problem does this solve?

<!-- Concretely — what's the use case the harness doesn't handle today? -->

## Proposed shape

Pick the primitive that best fits, and describe it:

- [ ] **New agent** — `<name>`: when it would be invoked, what tools it'd have, what it'd output
- [ ] **New skill** — `<name>`: the procedure it would codify; when it'd be invoked
- [ ] **New workflow** — `<name>`: the phases + agents + schemas
- [ ] **New rule** — `<name>`: paths it auto-loads on; what it'd enforce
- [ ] **New slash command** — `/<name>`: what it'd invoke
- [ ] **Change to existing primitive** — which one + what change

## Alternatives considered

<!-- What did you try? What would it look like to handle this without a harness change? -->

## Out of scope

<!-- What this feature should NOT do, so reviewers don't expand scope. -->
